offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in insurance claim submissions cause cash flow gaps. We streamline the submission process instead of manual claim submission processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
DM outreach to clinics with demo video

try_it: Let users try simple claim submission interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
